summary: Add plan-check command that probes /codes, /pair, /latest, /quota, /enriched, /history once each and reports the highest tier the key supports.
reason: Free-tier users hit plan-upgrade-required errors on /enriched and /history with no clear signal which endpoints they can use. plan-check converts about 5 quota ticks into a definitive tier readout. Paths in output are masked via lastN(key, 4); raw key never appears in --json output.
validated_outcome: On a Free-tier key, plan-check reports detected_tier=Free with /enriched and /history correctly flagged as plan-upgrade-required and paths masked as /v6/****<last4>/...
